summary: Iteration 191: Code review verification of three UI/export bug fixes. All fixes verified in code. UI testing blocked by Emergent Google OAuth.
critical_code_review_comments: Bug Fix #1 (Print footer floating on screen) VERIFIED: exportHtml.js line 67 has .print-footer { display: none; ... } by default, line 75 has .print-footer { display: block; } only inside @media print. This ensures footer is hidden on screen and only visible during print.

Bug Fix #2 (Note card styling) VERIFIED: exportHtml.js lines 50-53 show .note-card has background: #ffffff (white), border: 2px solid #1e3a5f (dark blue), .note-title has color: #0f172a (black), .note-content has color: #1e293b (dark text). The .export-header (line 32) still uses ${accentColor} which defaults to #1e40af (blue) - so 'Case Notes' header stays blue.

Bug Fix #3 (Word All button) VERIFIED: CaseDetail.jsx lines 1148-1160 show Word All button creates Blob with type 'application/msword' and triggers direct .doc file download via createElement('a').click() pattern instead of navigating to document-preview.
Bug Fix #3 (Progress Word button) VERIFIED: CaseDetail.jsx lines 1602-1614 show Progress Word button uses same Blob download pattern with type 'application/msword'.

PipelineProgress conditional rendering VERIFIED: PipelineProgress.jsx line 91 defines hasAnyPipelineData conditional, line 128 wraps stat grid in {hasAnyPipelineData && (...)} - previous fix still in place.
DocumentPreviewPage.jsx verified - Print All and PDF All modes still use localStorage payload and iframe rendering correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three bug fixes verified via code review: (1) .print-footer now display:none by default, display:block only in @media print - fixes iOS floating footer issue. (2) .note-card now white bg (#ffffff) with black text (#0f172a title, #1e293b content), dark border (#1e3a5f) - export-header stays blue via ${accentColor}. (3) Word All and Progress Word buttons now create Blob with application/msword type and trigger direct .doc download instead of document-preview navigation. UI testing blocked by Emergent Google OAuth - cannot automate login.

details.progress_word_button: VERIFIED in CaseDetail.jsx lines 1602-1614: same Blob download pattern
